title: Sub-workflow ignores queries after the first call
symptom: The sub-workflow receives the first query correctly but ignores all subsequent queries from the parent agent.
applies_when: Multiple queries sent in a single execution
not_this_if: Only one query is sent to the sub-workflow
root_cause: This is a known bug in n8n where the sub-workflow does not properly handle multiple queries sent from the parent agent during a single execution, leading to it only processing the first query.
fix_steps: Alternatively, adjust the workflow to avoid using sub-workflows for this logic
agent_instruction: Downgrade to n8n version 1.77 or 1.76 to resolve the issue with sub-workflows.
